message:
feat(scheduler): add backoff park metrics and follower short-wait suppression

Instrument the three-lane scheduler's backoff parking path with granular
metrics to diagnose wake-timeout futex churn:

- Add PreemptionMetrics fields: backoff_parks_total, timeout/indefinite
  park counts, timeout_nanos_total, short_wait_le_5ms, and per-follower
  variants for deadline-ignored/timeout/indefinite/skip decisions
- Extract recording helpers (record_backoff_deadline_selection,
  record_backoff_timeout_park, record_backoff_indefinite_park,
  record_backoff_short_wait_skip) for testability
- Implement follower short-wait suppression: skip arming timeouts ≤5ms
  for follower I/O phase workers to reduce futex churn, re-entering
  the scheduling loop instead
- Add scheduler_wakeup_correctness.rs test file
- Add 7 unit tests covering all metric recording paths and the skip
  decision boundary

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
